mapper.select: SELECT cu.id AS applyId, cu.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, c.name, c.category_id AS categoryId, COALESCE(cc.name, '') AS categoryName, COALESCE(c.intro, '') AS intro, cu.join_time AS applyTime, CASE cu.audit_status WHEN 0 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN 1 THEN 'APPROVED' ELSE 'REJECTED' END AS status FROM circle_user cu INNER JOIN circle c ON cu.circle_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN circle_category cc ON c.category_id = cc.id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON cu.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE cu.audit_status = 0 ORDER BY cu.create_time DESC
